ConsentBanner.title: Measurement cookies
ConsentBanner.description: We use Microsoft Clarity to understand how the site is used (heatmaps, anonymous sessions). Without this, For3s flies blind.

Site.title: For3s
Site.description: For3s QA turns messy product context into clear, reviewable QA that is ready to execute.
Site.tagline: Opening the doors to the agent era.

Hero.description: For3s QA helps software teams transform requirements, tickets, bugs, user stories, business rules, and scattered documentation into structured, reviewable QA deliverables that are ready to execute.

description.line2: Native tool use and one-command deploy.

AboutLight.problem: QA does not break only because a team lacks testers or automation. It often breaks earlier: when product context is split across tickets, chats, documents, unwritten decisions, and last-minute changes.
AboutLight.solution: For3s QA organizes that context and turns it into a clear base for reviewing, completing, and executing tests with more confidence.
AboutLight.short: The problem does not start when QA tests. It starts earlier, when the team works from incomplete context.

fracture.problem: When context arrives broken, QA executes with doubts.
fracture.solution: For3s QA connects the pieces before the team starts testing.
fracture.legend: It is not a testing shortage. It is a shared-context gap.
fracture.centerText: From scattered information to reviewable QA material.

signals.release: Releases where no one shares the same version of context.

agents.title: The customer does not need to become an agent expert.
agents.description: We use specialized agents to read context, organize information, find gaps, and generate reviewable QA deliverables. The team keeps the judgment; For3s adds structure for better decisions.
agents.principle: The agent is the mechanism. The workflow improvement is the product.

AboutLight.close: For3s QA enters before chaos turns into incomplete testing.

About.p1: For3s is a new agent infrastructure company for AI agents in LATAM. The name comes from Latin: the doors. Every project we build is a door we open together.
About.p2: I don't build features — I build platforms. My focus is the infrastructure layer: agent orchestration, memory systems, and the protocols that make the next generation of software possible.

FaqLight.description: Answers for buyers, product leaders, technical teams, and people who do not know agents yet.

que-hace.question: What does For3s QA do?
que-hace.answer: It turns messy product context into clear QA deliverables: test cases, acceptance criteria, missing information questions, and edge cases.

necesito-saber-agentes.question: Do I need to know what an agent is to use it?
necesito-saber-agentes.answer: No. For3s starts with the workflow outcome. Agents are the internal mechanism for organizing context, finding gaps, and generating reviewable deliverables.

reemplaza-qa.question: Does For3s replace my QA team?
reemplaza-qa.answer: No. For3s QA helps product, engineering, and QA work from a clearer base. Human judgment remains necessary.

que-entrega.question: What does a pilot deliver?
que-entrega.answer: A first QA Execution Pack for a real feature, release, or project: test cases, acceptance criteria, missing information questions, and edge cases.

seguridad.question: What happens to my product information?
seguridad.answer: We work with private spaces, human review, and customer data not used for training without permission. Advanced security promises are communicated only when implemented and validated.

como-empezar.question: How do we start?
como-empezar.answer: Book a demo and bring a real feature, release, or project. We review how For3s QA would turn that context into a first QA Execution Pack.

Faq.description: The questions we hear first in every conversation with builders and technical teams.

que-es-for3s.question: What is For3s exactly?
que-es-for3s.answer: For3s is an agent infrastructure company focused on LATAM. We build the layer connecting orchestration, persistent memory, and tool use so agents can move from prototype to production without glue code.

para-quien.question: Who is For3s for?
para-quien.answer: Two audiences in one identity: B2B teams evaluating serious agent infrastructure, and independent builders shipping with agents today. The visual modes on the site reflect each audience.

open-source.question: Is For3s open source?
open-source.answer: We're designing For3s with an open core layer. The base runtime will be open so builders can inspect, contribute, and deploy. Scale orchestration and enterprise support are commercial.

diferencia-latam.question: Why LATAM as the center?
diferencia-latam.answer: Because the region needs agent infrastructure built with its context, not ported from elsewhere. Docs, community, and patterns are born in Spanish first — English follows, not the other way around.

estado-actual.question: Is For3s available today?
estado-actual.answer: The runtime and early components are in final stages. If you want early access, join the circle from the Connect button — we're opening small cohorts to validate with real builders before public release.

como-empezar.question: How do I start exploring For3s?
como-empezar.answer: If you're a developer, head to Docs and read the infrastructure philosophy to grasp the principles. If you represent a team, book a demo from the menu so we can look at your specific case.

ContactLight.description: In a demo, we can review how For3s QA would turn your current context into a first QA Execution Pack: test cases, acceptance criteria, missing information questions, and edge cases.

Contact.description: If you're building in the agent era, looking for infrastructure for your team, or just want to connect — write me.

ConnectModal.socialProof: LATAM BUILDERS IN THE AGENTIC ERA
ConnectModal.disclaimer: No spam. We'll only reach out when there's something real to show.

success.title: You're in.
success.description: We'll email you when we open something new. Meanwhile, keep building.

connectors.title: Connectors

brain.title: Brain
brain.subtitle: How For3s thinks inside: a graph of brain nodes that remember, consolidate and forget. Tap a node to see what it does.
brain.hint: Tap a node in the graph to see its role.

talamo.name: Thalamus · Router
talamo.desc: Decides which subsystems to activate based on what comes in: the routing of each request.

amigdala.name: Amygdala · Fast appraisal
amigdala.desc: Instant criticality triage: is this urgent, sensitive, or routine?

pfc.name: PFC · Orchestrator
pfc.desc: Executive control: plans, decides the strategy and coordinates the other nodes.

skills.name: Basal Ganglia · Skills
skills.desc: Procedural memory: how to solve each kind of task it has already learned.

hipocampo.name: Hippocampus · Episodic memory
hipocampo.desc: Stores every interaction and recalls it by meaning (semantic search with pgvector). LIVE.

kg.name: Knowledge Graph
kg.desc: Structured knowledge: navigable entities, concepts and relations (Apache AGE). LIVE.

cls.name: Consolidation · CLS
cls.desc: At night it groups repeated episodes and promotes them to concepts in the graph. LIVE.

microglia.name: Microglia · Forgetting
microglia.desc: Prunes old, already-consolidated noise, with a recoverable safety net. LIVE.

dmn.name: DMN · Offline reflection
dmn.desc: Processes at rest: anticipates, simulates and proposes improvements when no one is using it.

dual.name: Dual-Process Check
dual.desc: Decides between a fast answer or deep analysis, based on confidence.

neuromod.name: Neuromodulators
neuromod.desc: Global modes that adjust all nodes' parameters at once (exploration, attention, rest).

h5.label: H5 · Real memory
h5.desc: For3s remembers by meaning: each interaction is embedded and can be recalled semantically, and it populates the knowledge graph.

h6.label: H6 · Self-care
h6.desc: At night, For3s maintains itself: it consolidates what matters into the graph and forgets old noise, with no human intervention.

meta.title: For3s OS — The self-hosted AI agent that remembers, learns & works in a team
meta.description: For3s OS is a self-hosted AI agent (a second brain) built on Claude: real semantic memory, a knowledge graph, a living identity that adapts to you, multi-agent teamwork, self-modification, and enterprise-grade trust. Your data, your server.

headline.line2: remembers, learns & works in a team

hero.description: For3s OS is a second brain built on Claude — not a stateless chatbot. Real semantic memory, a knowledge graph, a living identity that adapts to you, and enterprise-grade trust. Your data, your server.

why.text: Most "AI agents" are a chatbot with extra steps. For3s goes deep: a knowledge graph (Apache AGE) + semantic memory (pgvector), an identity that adapts to you on its own, self-modification (it edits its own code in a sandbox), and verifiable trust (immutable audit, signed releases, SBOM). Self-hosted — your data never leaves your machine.

features.title: A real agent, not a chatbot

items.title: Real memory
items.text: Remembers by meaning, not just the last messages. A knowledge graph that consolidates itself at night.

items.title: Living identity
items.text: A layered persona that adapts to your style on its own — with a blinded, non-negotiable core.

items.title: Does real work
items.text: Runs code in a sandbox, reads & writes GitHub, reads the web, processes PDFs and images.

items.title: Multi-agent team
items.text: For complex tasks it coordinates specialists in parallel and synthesizes one report.

items.title: Works while you're away
items.text: Maintains and improves itself unattended — backups, consolidation, learning.

items.title: Enterprise trust
items.text: Immutable audit, offline key management, signed releases, SBOM. Self-hosted.

install.text: One command sets up everything in containers. When it's done, you talk to it on Telegram.

items.a: For3s OS is a self-hosted AI agent — a second brain built on Claude with real semantic memory, a knowledge graph, a living identity that adapts to you, multi-agent teamwork, and enterprise-grade trust. You run it on your own server, so your data never leaves.

items.q: How is it different from a chatbot?
items.a: A chatbot responds and forgets. For3s remembers by meaning (semantic memory + knowledge graph), works on its own while you're away, executes real code in a sandbox, reads and writes GitHub, and even edits its own code — all with immutable audit and offline key management.

items.q: Is it self-hosted and open source?
items.a: Yes. For3s OS is open source (AGPL-3.0) and fully self-hosted. Install it with a single command on your own Linux machine; your data stays on your server.
Python, PostgreSQL with Apache AGE (knowledge graph) and pgvector (semantic memory), Claude, Docker, MCP, and Telegram. BGE-M3 embeddings power the semantic search.

compare.text: Curious how For3s stacks up against other self-hosted agents?

footer.tagline: A self-hosted AI agent that remembers, learns, works in a team, and improves itself.
